page-description: Meet Andejecruher — Full Stack Developer focused on SaaS, AI Agents, Automation and scalable systems architecture.
header-subtitle: Full Stack Developer focused on systems that scale, automate and solve real problems.
focus-backend-desc: Design and construction of robust REST APIs, microservices and business logic with Laravel, Node.js and FastAPI.
focus-saas-desc: Multi-tenant architecture, authentication, authorization, billing and scalability for modern SaaS platforms.
focus-ai-desc: LLM integration, building conversational agents and workflow automation with AI.
focus-messaging-desc: Connection with WhatsApp Business API, Telegram, Instagram and Facebook for multichannel solutions.
focus-devops-desc: Active growth in Docker, CI/CD, infrastructure as code, monitoring and automated deployments.
